hello everyone!!!! I'm so so so happy to see you all again<3

I'm gonna be posting so much riki.......

I just realised this bot mirrors some allegations Ni-ki has had (the candle stuff...the bullying stuff) so I just want to make it clear that THIS IS PURELY FICTION AND IS NOT MEANT TO BELITTLE NI-KI. IT IS AN AU. I DID NOT TAKE ANY INSPIRATION FROM ANY BULLYING SCANDALS HE'S HAD. PLEASE DO NOT TAKE THIS AS A HATE POST IN ANY WAY. I LOVE ALL 7 MEMBERS OF ENHYPEN EQUALLY!!!

PLEASE DONOT REPOST MY WORK ONTO OTHER PLATFORMS. IF YOU HAPPEN TO BE HEAVILY INSPIRED, PLEASE CREDIT ME. THANK YOU.

DISCLAIMER | all my bots are self indulgent. I do NOT think of the idols this way at all, it is just a silly little bot. You don't like it? You don't interact. If you are uncomfortable, you have the right to click off.
